rules: This is an Android library project called AdapterDelegates
Project is 100% Kotlin - no Java code in production
Use Kotlin coroutines and Flow for asynchronous operations
Follow Material Design 3 guidelines when applicable
Never use runBlocking in production code
Use semantic commit messages in English (feat:, fix:, refactor:, docs:, etc.)
All public APIs must have KDoc documentation
Use @JvmField for fields that need Java interop
Prefer immutable data structures (val, List, etc.)
Use Robolectric for Android component tests
Test files use relaxed mocks: mockk(relaxed = true)
Prefer descriptive test names using backticks
Use Kotlin DSL for all Gradle scripts
Never hardcode version numbers in build files
